title: NEW! Senior Manager, Strategy and Innovation (Contract)
description:
• Lead innovation initiatives and proof-of-concepts (POCs) for clients across the Asia-Pacific region, translating complex business challenges into actionable solutions.
  • Design and facilitate innovation sprints and workshops, collaborating with cross-functional teams including designers, product managers, solution architects, and marketers to deliver high-quality solutions.
  • Conduct qualitative and quantitative research to understand user needs, market trends, and business opportunities, informing solution design and strategy.
  • Partner with clients and internal stakeholders to align on objectives, provide strategic guidance, and ensure successful project delivery with measurable impact.
  • Represent the organization as a subject matter expert at industry forums, events, and through thought leadership content, driving visibility and positioning the company as a leader in innovation.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders at all levels, sharing best practices and driving knowledge transfer across teams.

Interested applicants please send your resume in MS Word format and attention it to Rachel Yeo (R22104385).

Shortlisted candidates will be notified

Data provided is for recruitment purposes only

www.ambition.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Ambition is a leading global recruitment and executive search business operating across key international cities. We access hard-to-find, high-calibre professionals within Banking & Financial Services, Finance & Accounting, Sales & Marketing, Supply Chain & Procurement, and Technology.

We believe our size is a significant differentiation in the recruitment industry. We are big enough to undertake large-scale projects for our clients, yet retain the soul and personality of a smaller company. We are best known for our specialisation with in-depth knowledge and expertise, well-established networks, and deep relationships. We work towards ‘building better futures’ for our clients, candidates and our community.

For more information, please visit www.ambition.com.sg or follow us on Ambition’s social media.
postedCompany.name: AMBITION GROUP SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
